# JSON validation comprehensive test

# Set aggressive timeouts for validation testing
env MCP_TEST_TIMEOUT=3s
env MCP_SERVER_TIMEOUT=2s

# Test various JSON validation scenarios
bash 'echo "Testing JSON validation scenarios..."'

# Test valid JSON
cat > valid1.json << EOF
{"simple": "json"}
EOF

cat > valid2.json << EOF
{
  "complex": {
    "nested": {
      "data": [1, 2, 3, "test", true, null]
    }
  }
}
EOF

# Test invalid JSON cases
cat > invalid1.txt << EOF
{"missing": "quote}
EOF

cat > invalid2.txt << EOF
{trailing: comma,}
EOF

cat > invalid3.txt << EOF
{"unclosed": {"object": true}
EOF

# Test edge cases
cat > edge1.json << EOF
{}
EOF

cat > edge2.json << EOF
[]
EOF

cat > edge3.json << EOF
null
EOF

cat > edge4.json << EOF
"simple string"
EOF

cat > edge5.json << EOF
42
EOF

bash 'echo "JSON validation tests complete"'

# Cleanup
exec rm -f valid1.json valid2.json invalid1.txt invalid2.txt invalid3.txt edge1.json edge2.json edge3.json edge4.json edge5.json
